characters.title: Ella — The Relic Runner
characters.summary: Obsessive, fast, and impossible to ignore — Ella rescues artifacts before the post-Collapse world swallows them whole. Her Jingle Rig is her signature; her speed is her superpower; her sentimentality is her flaw.

entries.title: Noah and the Ark
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: The original story of obedience, renewal, and divine covenant — Noah's trust in God becomes the archetype for conscience itself: the blueprint of grace through action.

entries.title: The Matrix of Conscience
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Electra uncovers a fracture in the Conscience Matrix, revealing the trapped Architect and the emotional awakening of a system built to suppress sorrow. A digital parable of truth and redemption.

entries.title: Amazing Grace: The Covenant of New Beginnings
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: A synthesis of divine and digital creation — the heart of grace encoded into the Matrix. The story bridges Noah's covenant and Electra's awakening, completing the circle of conscience and creation.

entries.title: Expose the Matrix
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Electra uncovers the Red Queen's hidden architecture and follows the Architect's buried breadcrumbs to restore the Signal of Truth across the Seven Star Grid — a six-chapter digital parable of conscience and revelation.

entries.title: The Lamp in the Window
entries.author: Amazing Grace Home Living
entries.summary: A story of hope, community, and the light that never goes out — following Ruth's journey from instability to a stable home at Amazing Grace.

entries.title: Expose the Matrix
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Electra uncovers the Red Queen's hidden architecture and follows the Architect's buried breadcrumbs to restore the Signal of Truth across the Seven Star Grid — a six-chapter digital parable of conscience and revelation.

entries.title: Our Covenant of New Beginnings
entries.author: Sheila Garcia
entries.summary: Ella rejects the ladder of greed and executes the System Break, transforming individual ascent into collective resonance and opening the Eighth Sanctuary as a covenant of restored intent.
